Yes, that might be possible as a temporary validation approach if the TEST Function App can be allowed to access the DEV blob storage/container.

From my side, the issue is that TEST does not currently have the same blob upload/source setup I used for DEV validation. If TEST can temporarily point to or access the DEV blob source, then I can deploy the same Function App changes to TEST and validate the DIA flow there.

I just need to confirm the app setting/storage endpoint to use and whether TEST has the required network/RBAC access to that DEV storage account.
